# Contributing to Optica

Thanks for contributing to Optica.

## Branch Naming

Please create branches using the following format:

```text
<type>/<short-description>

Examples:
    feat/incident-dashboard
    feat/add-vector-search
    fix/document-upload-timeout
    infra/setup-keycloak
    ai/root-cause-engine

Allowed branch prefixes:
    feat/ → New feature
    fix/ → Bug fix
    bug/ → Investigation/debugging
    refactor/ → Internal cleanup
    docs/ → Documentation changes
    test/ → Test changes
    chore/ → Repo maintenance
    infra/ → Infrastructure / CI / Docker
    ai/ → AI and RAG related work

Pull Requests
    Keep pull requests focused and small
    Link the related issue if one exists
    Add screenshots for UI changes
    Ensure tests pass before requesting review
